reasoning: Strong circular medallion silhouette with golden/brown pixel border — instantly readable primary shape at all sizes. Heart-with-wings motif is thematically perfect for a respawn button and very charming; warm pink + gold palette is soft and toy-like, passes the sticker test. On dark bg contrast is excellent — golden ring and white face pop cleanly. On light/cream bg the white circular face loses separation from the background; the golden border rescues the silhouette but inner detail (pink heart on near-white) softens. At true 1x the circular outline still communicates but the wing detail collapses into a generic blob — the heart reads but the wings dissolve. Charm is high, silhouette primary shape is strong, but the light-bg face bleed and 1x inner-motif compression prevent a clean pass.
